# HTTP 418 — I'm a Teapot

> The ultimate HTTP 418 "I'm a teapot" experience — brew tea, refuse coffee, honor RFC 2324.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Lucide React, Web Audio API

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — main application entry
- src/components/ — UI components (teapot, brew timer, receipt, customizer, achievements)
- src/hooks/ — custom React hooks
- src/data/ — tea menu data, achievement definitions

## Features
- Animated SVG teapot, HTTP status tea menu, brew timer, thermal receipt
- Teapot customizer, 10 achievements, sound effects, coffee refusal (RFC 2324)

## URLs
- Live: https://http-418-teapot.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/http-418-teapot
